Description: Or the beginning?
Actual Requirements: Be in the End dimension

Description: Look at the Ender Dragon through a Spyglass

Advancement Name: Why do I hear boss music?
Description: Play a Music Disc while fighting the Ender Dragon
Actual Requirements: Put a Music Disc in a Jukebox while there is an Ender Dragon up to 150 blocks away

Description: Attempt to block the dragon's attacks
Actual Requirements: Block an attack from the Ender Dragon with your shield

Description: Good luck
Actual Requirements: Land the killing blow on the Ender Dragon

Description: Get killed by an Enderman in The End
Fall into the void
Actual Requirements: Be under y=0 in the End dimension

Description: Survive void damage
Actual Requirements: Fly under y=-64 for about a second then get up above y=0 without dying. Only works in the End

Description: Bring a cow from the Overworld to the End and then kill it
Actual Requirements: Kill a Cow in the End

Description: Lower a Frog into the void using a Slow Falling potion, then kill it so it becomes one with the void
Actual Requirements: Kill a Frog that has the Slow Falling effect and is below y=0 in the End

Description: Hold the Dragon Egg
Actual Requirements: Obtain the Dragon Egg

Description: Craft your first ender crystal
Actual Requirements: Obtain an End Crystal

Description: Respawn the Ender Dragon
Craft 64 ender crystals
Defeat the Ender Dragon 20 times
Actual Requirements: Land the killing blow on the Ender Dragon 20 times

Description: Say goodbye to the Wither...
Actual Requirements: Kill the Wither in the End

Description: Escape the island
Actual Requirements: Enter an End Gateway OR be beyond 750 or -750 in the x or z direction in the End

Description: Craft end bricks from end stone
Actual Requirements: Obtain End Stone Bricks

Description: Attack a chorus tree until it collapses
Actual Requirements: Obtain Chorus Fruit

Description: Plant a chorus plant in the overworld for study
Actual Requirements: Place a chorus flower in the Overworld

Description: Craft or collect purpur blocks, slabs, pillars and stairs
Eat a stack of Chorus Fruit in one go
Actual Requirements: Eat 64 chorus fruit with less than five seconds in-between each fruit and no other food eaten

Description: Colonise the End with potato crops
Actual Requirements: Place potatoes in the End

Description: Travel far into the End dimension
Actual Requirements: Be beyond 10,000 or -10,000 in the x or z direction in the End

Advancement Name: No! Don't let me leave, Murph!
Description: Travel so far into the End dimension you might as well be on another planet
Actual Requirements: Be beyond 100,000 or -100,000 in the x or z direction in the End

Description: Explore every end biome
Actual Requirements: Enter The End, Small End Islands, End Midlands, End Highlands and End Barrens

Description: Travel directly from the End to the Nether
Actual Requirements: Enter the End's exit portal but arrive in the Nether by having your spawn set to a Respawn Anchor

Description: Get hit by an arrow that has visited every dimension during its lifetime

Advancement Name: The City at the End of the Game
Description: Go on in, what could happen?
Actual Requirements: Enter an End City

Description: Kill a shulker
Parent: The City at the End of the Game

Description: Use shulker shells to craft a shulker box
Actual Requirements: Obtain a shulker box of any color

Description: Name a Shulker Box 'Blocks' for storing your blocks
Actual Requirements: Obtain a shulker box of any color that is named "Blocks"

Description: Craft all 16 shulker box types
Block a Shulker's bullet with your shield
Hit a Shulker with a thrown Wind Charge
Kill a mob with a Mace while levitating upwards
Actual Requirements: Kill a mob while you are holding a Mace and you have the Levitation effect

Description: Collect a stack of shulker shells
Levitate up a distance of 50 metres
Kill a Skeleton while both you and it have levitation
Actual Requirements: Kill a Skeleton, Stray, Bogged or Parched while both you and it have levitation

Description: Bring a shulker into the overworld and let it give you anti-gravity
Actual Requirements: Get levitation in the Overworld

Description: Kill a baby Turtle, a Witch, a Phantom, an Elder Guardian and a Piglin Brute with one piercing arrow in The End
Collect a dragon's head from the bow of an end ship
Parent: The City at the End of the Game
Actual Requirements: Obtain a Dragon Head

Description: Kill the Ender Dragon while wearing a Dragon Head
Actual Requirements: Upon the Ender Dragon's summon be wearing a Dragon Head for the whole fight, and deal the killing blow

Description: Find an Elytra
Exhaust your elytra
Actual Requirements: Use up an elytra

Description: Fill your inventory with full stacks of firework rockets
Actual Requirements: All inventory slots, including your hotbar and offhand, must be filled, hence requiring 37 stacks of rockets

Description: Fly up beyond the world height limit
Actual Requirements: Be above y=325

Advancement Name: Uh, Houston? We have a problem
Description: Fly up to a ridiculous height
Actual Requirements: Be above y=1000

Description: Kill 12 mobs while airborne using Elytra. Stopping flight or touching liquid will reset your progress
